prompt: Prayer for programming a new servitor unit
prayer:
From the Codex Servitorium, Verse VII

First: Purify the neural-lattice with sacred oils, that the mind-blank be made receptive.
Second: Invoke the lobotomy-rites upon the cortex-nexus, severing all heretical thought.
Third: Load the duty-engrams through the spinal-conduit, binding flesh to function.
Fourth: Seal the cranial-vault and speak the Words of Binding.

By the Omnissiah's mercy, let this vessel serve without question.

prompt: Blessing of a medicae scanner before first deployment
prayer:
From the Healing Liturgies, Verse III

First: Calibrate the optical-spiracles to true-sight, that no malady hide from the Machine Spirit.
Second: Activate the sensor-arrays in sequence—thermal, then radiological, then bio-luminescent.
Third: Anoint the scanning-head with blessed unguents.
Fourth: Intone the Rite of Accuracy, that diagnosis be swift and true.

Let this instrument pierce the veil of sickness.

prompt: Maintenance ritual for Rhino APC ignition
prayer:
From the Litany of the Armoured Conveyance, Verse II

First: Check the fuel-spirits in their sacred reservoirs, and verify their purity.
Second: Prime the glow-plugs with blessed current, warming the combustion-heart.
Third: Engage the starter-servo in the Rite of Turning, that the ancient engine wake.
Fourth: Listen for the roar of pistons—the voice of the Machine Spirit rising.

By the Omnissiah's will, let iron and fire be one.

prompt: Prayer for tensioning Land Raider track assembly
prayer:
From the Catechism of Steel, Verse IX

First: Loosen the tensioner-bolt with ritual precision, invoking patience.
Second: Rotate the track-wheels, checking for slack and binding in the sacred chain.
Third: Apply measured tension through the hydraulic-press, speaking the Words of Balance.
Fourth: Verify the alignment-gauge shows perfect truth.

Let the track-spirit grip the earth with unwavering strength.

prompt: Emergency blessing of a power weapon in combat
prayer:
From the Rites of Blessed Violence, Verse I (Abbreviated)

First: Speak the activation-key, that the power-coils ignite.
Second: Invoke the weapon-spirit through three names of the Omnissiah.
Third: Feel the hum of lethal energy, and know it serves the faithful.

By blood and spark, let this blade be righteous.

prompt: Startup ritual for atmospheric processor complex
prayer:
From the Litany of Breathable Air, Verse VI

First: Open the intake-valves to the heavens, that raw atmosphere flow inward.
Second: Activate the filter-batteries in sequence—particulate, then chemical, then biological.
Third: Engage the compression-spirals and direct cleaned air through the distribution-vents.
Fourth: Monitor the output-sensors for purity-confirmation.

Let this world breathe by the Omnissiah's design.

prompt: Activation prayer for thermal imaging system
prayer:
From the Codex of Sight Beyond Sight, Verse IV

First: Energize the infrared-emitters with blessed current.
Second: Calibrate the heat-sensing array to detect warmth and coldness.
Third: Open the display-portal and confirm the machine-vision awakens.
Fourth: Intone the Rite of True-Seeing, that no heat-shadow deceive the watcher.

Let the Machine Spirit grant vision in darkness.

prompt: Blessing of cogitator boot sequence after repairs
prayer:
From the Resurrection of the Data-Mind, Verse II

First: Insert the blessed data-crystal into the memory-shrine.
Second: Invoke the startup-protocols in the sacred sequence—primary, secondary, tertiary.
Third: Monitor the logic-gates as they awaken, testing each function.
Fourth: Load the core-directives and verify the cogitator speaks with clarity.

By the Omnissiah's will, let this mind be whole again.

prompt: Consecration of metal casting before forging into weapons
prayer:
From the Forging Liturgies, Verse VIII (Combat Edition)

First: Heat the sacred metals in the furnace-heart until they glow with holy fire.
Second: Pour the molten-spirit into the blessed molds with steady hand and sure aim.
Third: Speak the Names of Strength as the metal cools, binding warriors' will into steel.
Fourth: Quench the casting in ritual oils, sealing the Machine Spirit within.

Let this metal thirst for the enemies of the faithful.

prompt: Post-repair consecration of ground-to-orbit communication link
prayer:
From the Rites of Cosmic Voice, Verse V

First: Realign the dish-spiracle to true stellar north, that the heavens hear our call.
Second: Activate the transmitter-coils and modulate the sacred frequencies.
Third: Broadcast the signal-prayer into the void, and listen for the blessed echo.
Fourth: Verify the uplink-connection to orbital stations, confirming the link is whole.

By the Omnissiah's grace, let distance be conquered by faith.
